name: Fujifilm Instax Share SP-3 Smartphone Printer
description: Take your smartphone photos and print them out onto instant film with the portable INSTAX SHARE SP-3 Smartphone Printer from FUJIFILM. Supporting INSTAX SQUARE format film and featuring a unique 3-color OLED exposure method.

features.Key Features:: Print Photos Directly from Smart Device | Uses INSTAX SQUARE Instant Film | Image Size: 2.4 x 2.4" | Print Speed: 13 Seconds | Integrated Wi-Fi Connectivity | Runs on NP-50 Rechargeable Battery Pack | INSTAX SHARE App for iOS & Android | Various Templates and Filters for Photos | FUJIFILM INSTAX SHARE SP-3 Smartphone Printer | FUJIFILM NP-50 Rechargeable Lithium-Ion Battery (3.7v 1000mAh) for Finepix F50fd Digital Camera | USB Cable (3.3')
